CustomField.description: 日付/時間値間の経過時間を確認する https://help.salesforce.com/articleView?id=formula_examples_dates.htm&type=5
CustomField.formula: IF( MELCRMOPETOOL__TimeStampStatus7__c - MELCRMOPETOOL__TimeStampStatus3__c > 0 , TEXT( FLOOR( MELCRMOPETOOL__TimeStampStatus7__c - MELCRMOPETOOL__TimeStampStatus3__c ) ) & " days " & TEXT( ROUND( MOD( (MELCRMOPETOOL__TimeStampStatus7__c - MELCRMOPETOOL__TimeStampStatus3__c ) * 24, 24 ),0 ) ) & " hours ", "" )
CustomField.label: 解決時間
